ValidationRule.description: Applies to the "DX Software Services" Case record type PRIOR: MM NEW: MG 2202.09.22 cleaned up formatting + Error Msg
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,OR(RecordType.Name = 'Dx Software Services' ,RecordTypeId = '0123A000001GjKo') /*Dx Software Services EMEA L2*/ ,ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed') ,ISBLANK(Case_Description__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_006: When closing a Case, the Case Description field cannot be blank
